name: All 200 Ideas — Jury Run
description: randy-stack-50 + sim-frontier-50 + project-informed-50 + consumer-ai-viral-50 through Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V4 Flash.

concepts.name: OMEN PROVE

concepts.name: BREACH ZERO

concepts.name: RANGE LIVE

concepts.summary: Train a safe personal reply twin for creator FAQs, intros, routine messages, dating replies, and approval-based multi-channel responses.

concepts.name: Hobby Coach With Brag Clips
concepts.summary: Coach and showcase progress in guitar, chess, cooking, dance, and other hobbies with feedback, weekly clips, and niche challenges.

concepts.name: News Bias Mirror
concepts.summary: Compare how different outlets frame the same story in side-by-side cards or videos with citations and confidence labels.

concepts.name: Study Sprint Storymaker
concepts.summary: Turn study sessions into animated recaps, quiz cards, flashcard decks, streak brag posts, and student leaderboard clips.

concepts.name: Personal Myth Generator
concepts.summary: Turn a user's tastes, photos, and prompts into a personal fantasy lore universe with archetype quiz, portraits, lore cards, and trailer.

concepts.name: Roast and Compliment Trading Cards
concepts.summary: Turn opt-in personality inputs into funny trading cards, friend comparisons, roast battles, squad decks, and branded packs.

concepts.name: Creator Collab Graph
concepts.summary: Show creators who they should collaborate with based on audience/style overlap and generate pitch assets, intro decks, and marketplace leads.

concepts.name: AI Debate Shorts
concepts.summary: Generate concise debate clips where users pick sides, cite sources, share their version, duet prompts, and build public argument threads.

concepts.name: Resume
concepts.summary: to-Content Career Coach - Convert a resume and goals into portfolio content, interview stories, career-brand assets, mock interviews, and LinkedIn post kits.

concepts.name: Moodboard
concepts.summary: to-Brand Kit - Turn a moodboard into name ideas, visual identity, colors, fonts, starter site, landing page, and social post templates.

concepts.name: Micro
concepts.summary: podcast Clip Maker - Turn voice notes or text into short social audio/video clips with motion graphics, captions, cover art, and summaries.

concepts.name: Baby Name Universe
concepts.summary: Generate name aesthetics, meanings, nursery moodboards, pronunciation audio, registry links, and family poll cards for expectant parents.

concepts.name: Offline Private Bestie
concepts.summary: On-device private AI companion for journaling, notes, voice memories, local chat, document summarization, and paid local model packs.

concepts.name: Deal and Dupe Scout
concepts.summary: Find cheaper lookalikes or better-value alternatives from screenshots and saved products with price tracking and shareable deal cards.

concepts.name: Fandom Trope Storyboard Studio
concepts.summary: Generate trope boards, scene cards, title cards, and original-character visual stories for fan creators and roleplayers.

concepts.name: Habit League
concepts.summary: Turn personal habits into seasonal leagues with team drafts, standings, weekly recap reels, public scorecards, and creator-hosted tournaments.

concepts.name: Neighborhood Swap and DIY Visualizer
concepts.summary: Show how thrift finds, used furniture, or swap items would look in your space before trading or buying.

personas.name: Riley, 38, skeptical pragmatist
personas.backstory: Operator at a 50-person company. Burned by hyped tools that didn't deliver. Wants proof, not pitch. Reads Hacker News skeptically.
turn_offs: feels like a demo not a product

personas.name: Sam, 29, early adopter
personas.backstory: Indie maker who follows new launches on X and Hacker News. Tries almost anything once if it sparks curiosity. Talks about new tools to friends.
personas.context: Active on X and Discord. Writes a small newsletter.
